summary: AI Concierge tool calling tests for DOMMMA real estate platform. All 6 tools tested: search_listings, find_contractors, calculate_budget, create_listing, triage_maintenance, schedule_viewing (via API). Frontend NovaChat integration verified with property cards and contractor links rendering correctly.

critical.issue: Returns 500 error due to listing created via AI Concierge missing lat/lng fields. The ai_tools.py _create_listing function doesn't set lat/lng but the Listing Pydantic model requires them.
critical.reproduction_steps: 1. Ask Nova to create a listing via AI Concierge. 2. Call GET /api/listings. 3. API returns 500 Internal Server Error
critical.root_cause: In /app/backend/services/ai_tools.py _create_listing(), the listing dictionary is missing lat and lng fields which are required by the Listing model in server.py
critical.suggested_fix: Add default lat/lng values (e.g., Vancouver coordinates 49.2827, -123.1207) to the _create_listing function when not provided

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix /app/backend/services/ai_tools.py _create_listing() to include lat/lng fields - add defaults like lat: 49.2827, lng: -123.1207 when not provided
Note: The /api/listings endpoint returns 500 because a listing was created via AI Concierge without lat/lng. Either add defaults or make lat/lng optional in the Listing model

success_rate.backend: 79% (11/14 tests passed - 3 failed due to /api/listings 500 error)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing database listings and contractors
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Concierge endpoint /api/ai/concierge is working correctly with Claude tool calling. All 6 tools verified: search_listings, find_contractors, calculate_budget, create_listing, triage_maintenance, schedule_viewing. Frontend NovaChat correctly uses the new endpoint with fallback to /api/chat. Property cards and contractor links render correctly in chat responses. CRITICAL BUG: The /api/listings endpoint returns 500 because a listing created via AI tool calling is missing lat/lng fields required by the Listing Pydantic model.
rca_of_issue: The ai_tools.py _create_listing function doesn't include lat and lng fields when creating a listing via tool calling. The Listing model in server.py has lat: float and lng: float as required fields without defaults. When GET /api/listings tries to serialize all listings including the one missing lat/lng, FastAPI's ResponseValidationError is raised. Fix: Add default coordinates (e.g., Vancouver center: 49.2827, -123.1207) in _create_listing() or make lat/lng optional in the Listing model.
